rows.label: qev025307_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome to the Sunshine Cafe. Please,
make yourself at home and relax.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025307_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Eh? What? You're currently
going around looking for food
unique to NLA for a Ma-non?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025307_MSG0003
rows.name:
In that case, how about our pride and joy, the
Hotdog? Freshly made and piping hot for 600G. I'm
sure they'll be more than satisfied with it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025307_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline, saying you don't need it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025307_MSG0004
rows.name:
Thank you. Here you go. ...Don't
go snacking on it just because
it looks delicious, alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025307_MSG0005
rows.name:
Oh, you're not buying it? I promise
it's worth it, so come back again
if you change your mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025307_MSG0007
rows.name:
I guarantee the taste is worth
the price, so come back again
when you've got 600G, okay.[ST:wait ]
